name: barcode_generate
description: Generate a barcode image (Code128, EAN-13, or UPC-A)

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The data to encode in the barcode

parameters.name: barcode_type
parameters.description: Barcode type: code128, ean13, or upc

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: File path to save the barcode image
